assignments.name: brandInfo
assignments.value: AnyVision Media — Johannesburg-based AI automation agency for SA SMEs. Helps 3-50 person businesses deploy AI tools without a tech team. Typical package R2k-R15k/mo. Founder: Ian Immelman.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 2500, temperature: 0.2, messages: [{role: 'user', content: $json.prompt}] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '🔥 HIGH-INTENT LEAD on ' + $json.platform + '
Score: ' + $json.intentScore + ' (' + $json.category + ')' + '
From: ' + $json.username + '
Comment: "' + $json.text + '"' + '
Suggested reply: ' + ($json.suggestedReply || '(draft yourself)') + '
Post: ' + $json.postUrl}) }}
